clientMessages.author: jesusbel360
clientMessages.content: What day should I be prepared to start receiving lead calls? Want to make sure I'm prepared.

clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
Hey, we have the ads scripted and we expect to launch by end of week, ideally within the next day or two. 

Before we turn everything on , we'll be notifying you, and making sure everything is clear in terms of how to use the app, what to expect with the leads that come in, etc

Have a great night

clientMessages.author: jesusbel360
clientMessages.content: Good morning Max, How’s everything going

clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
All the videos and ads are already prepared and ready to go. The only thing I’m waiting on right now is my editor to send over the final files...he’s in a different time zone and is currently asleep, so I should have those first thing tomorrow morning. If he was awake I would be able to launch it literally right now, but I'm just blocked till he gives me access to the vids. Also, we are going to be running those ads alongside the pics of you and the team to see what will work better.

As soon as I get them, we’ll get everything launched. Likely tomorrow.

Before we turn the ads on, I’ll also make sure you’re fully set up and comfortable with everything — how the leads come in, how to use the app, logins, what to expect, etc. We’ll walk you through it so when the leads start coming in it’s smooth and you’re ready to handle them.

We’ve got everything moving on this and I’ll keep you posted as soon as we push things live.
